title: Facebook Comment
description: Channel v1 Facebook comment contract for public comment or live comment intake before private handoff or safe public reply.
$comment: Sources: PACK-06 and TECH-06. Public comments must not expose private quote/order/payment/delivery data and must route private data collection to Messenger/private channel.

facebook_comment_id.description: Contract identifier for the Facebook comment.

live_session_id.description: Live session id when comment is from Meta Live.

contains_private_data.description: Whether the comment contains private data that cannot be handled publicly.

requires_private_handoff.description: Whether comment must be handed to Messenger/private channel.

safe_public_reply_allowed.description: Whether a public reply is allowed after policy/guard checks.
